title: Rebuilding CodeGrind's City Mode: Navigation, State, and Mobile Resilience
summary: How CodeGrind refactored its city mode to handle standalone routing, mobile shell bootstrap, and stateful navigation—lessons from 10 merged PRs.

social.bluesky_text: Rebuilding CodeGrind's City Mode: refactoring for standalone routing, mobile shell bootstrap, and resilient state. Four core fixes reduce cross-route bugs and improve navigation. Read how 41 commits and 10 PRs shaped a more reliable city experience....
social.linkedin_text: CodeGrind rebuilt city mode to address routing, mobile shell bootstrap, and state resilience. The effort, spanning 41 commits and 10 merged PRs, delivers standalone route detection, centralized mobile shell visibility, and responsive viewport sizing to prevent cross-route state leaks. Read the full post for details: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/06/01/codegrind-city-mode-rebuild/

reddit_profile.title: CodeGrind City Mode Refactor: Routing, Mobile Shell, and State
reddit_profile.text: We rebuilt CodeGrind's city mode to address fragmented routing, mobile shell visibility, and non-responsive viewports. The update includes standalone route detection and a declarative state approach across components. Full details: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/06/01/codegrind-city-mode-rebuild/

facebook_page.text: CodeGrind's city mode got a significant refactor to improve navigation, mobile bootstrapping, and state resilience. Learn how standalone routing, a single source of truth for mobile shell visibility, and responsive sizing help reduce bugs on mobile and desktop. Read the full post: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/06/01/codegrind-city-mode-rebuild/
